build_index: build an MCP index by fetching OpenAPI specs from all configured servers and persisting to disk
search_mcp_index: search the MCP index with a BM25 query and return the top ranked matching entries
classify_mcp_query: classify a natural language query to the single best matching MCP tool resource
load_mcp_index: load the persisted MCP index from disk and return it if not stale or missing
get_or_build_mcp_index: get the MCP index from disk or build it fresh if the index is missing or stale
